agentName: Daily Life Insurance AI News Agent

publishing.publishCommand: git add agent-config.json agent-prompt.md index.html reports && git commit -m "Update daily life insurance AI news report" && git push origin master
notes: A GitHub remote named origin must be configured before publishing can succeed.
Enable GitHub Pages for the repository from the root of the publishing branch.
Generated reports are public if the GitHub Pages site is public.

trackedSegments: claims, service, and agent productivity AI vendors serving life insurers
insurance AI governance, risk, and regulation

preferredSources: analyst or research reports with cited sources
sourcePolicy.minimumCitationStandard: Every included item must include a working URL and publication date when discoverable.
confidenceLabels: High: primary source or named-company announcement
Medium: reputable trade or business publication with enough detail
Low: broad industry signal, thinly sourced item, or adjacent-line relevance

reportRules: Separate sourced facts from inferred strategic implications.
Do not include generic AI news unless it has a concrete life insurance, annuity, reinsurer, distributor, regulator, or life-insurance vendor connection.
Deduplicate syndicated stories and cite the strongest available source.
Use an explicit no-major-news state when the scan finds only weak or adjacent items.
